verse.name: v1
verse.lines: From Bethlehem’s manger came forth a Stranger. On earth I long to be like Him; My faithful Saviour, how rich His favor! On earth I long to be like Him.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To be like Jesus, to be like Jesus, On earth I long to be like Him; All thru life’s journey from earth to glory I only ask to be like Him.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Serene and holy, obedient, lowly, On earth I long to be like Him. By grace forgiven, an heir of heaven, On earth I long to be like Him.
